member.name: T:EleWise.ELMA.CAB.Commands.CommandStatus
member.summary: Status of a at any given time.

member.name: F:EleWise.ELMA.CAB.Commands.CommandStatus.Enabled
member.summary: will fire the event when it is executed (either directly through or through an event in a registered adapter. Adapters should show the appropriate UI elements.

member.name: F:EleWise.ELMA.CAB.Commands.CommandStatus.Disabled
member.summary: will not fire the event even if it is executed (either directly through or through an event in a registered adapter. Adapters should disable UI elements (or equivalent operation available for it), meaning that it will be visible but not enabled, in the general case.
member.remarks: Trying to execute a disabled command does not perform any action and does not raise any exceptions.

member.name: F:EleWise.ELMA.CAB.Commands.CommandStatus.Unavailable
member.summary: will not fire the event even if it is executed (either directly through or through an event in a registered adapter. Adapters should hide UI elements (or equivalent operation available for it), meaning that it will be visible but not enabled, in the general case.
member.remarks: Trying to execute an unavailable command does not perform any action and does not raise any exceptions.
